rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0010
rows.name:
Meeting you here was a
stroke of good fortune.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0020
rows.name:
I was surveying the area to see if
there was any way to approach him.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0030
rows.name:
Void commands the Growth[ST:wide ]— he is the mortal
enemy who trampled the pride of us Larsians.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0040
rows.name:
Worry not. I will not commit the
folly of charging in alone.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0050
rows.name:
For now, I have reliable allies[ST:wide ]—
I have you here with me.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: xs33660100_MSG0060
rows.name:
Come, let us defeat him together and
fulfill our long-cherished desire.[ST:wait ]
